title: ribes alpinum f. aureum
intro: Ribes alpinum f. aureum, also known as golden alpine currant, is a golden-leaved variant of the alpine currant (Ribes alpinum) plant, a deciduous shrub native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Ribes alpinum f. aureum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its possible antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
